case_title: CHERYL MARTIN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (ENTIRE ACTION)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-03-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
